name: Ginkgo Extract EGb 761
summary: EGb 761 is a standardized Ginkgo biloba extract with moderate evidence for modest benefit in cognitive decline/dementia contexts.
description: Standardized Ginkgo extract containing ginkgolides and bilobalide; evidence is extract-specific.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: Concurrent warfarin or aspirin or other anticoagulant or antiplatelet medication due to ginkgo's own antiplatelet activity and documented additive bleeding risk
active bleeding disorder or recent hemorrhagic event
seizure disorder or epilepsy or concurrent antiepileptic medication due to a theoretical lowered seizure threshold
discontinue at least two weeks before scheduled surgery due to additive bleeding risk
pregnancy or breastfeeding due to insufficient safety data.
